rationale: Review 1 catches the most material API-design flaw — two redundant .mp/.mpr wrappers that add surface area with zero independent content — which Review 2 misses entirely; both reviews flag the missing @[simp] on fiberHomeomorph_one, but Review 1 loses points for missing the same gap on fiberHomeomorph_mul, making this a close call that edges toward first because removing confirmed bloat outweighs the speculative inverse-lemma addition and the narrower @[simp] coverage in Review 2.
